name: forseti-ledger
description: Public, build-in-public track record of Forseti — an oversight layer for self-custody DeFi agents. Markdown entries (redaction-gated, generated by the /publish-ledger skill) are built into a static site and deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.preview: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8788 --directory dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.note: Cloudflare Pages → Build command: 'npm run build' · Output directory: 'dist'. entries/*.md, index.md and feed.xml are GENERATED upstream — do not hand-edit.
